title: Swift (Enchantment)
description: Move faster, jump higher, and step with ease!
body:
**Swift Enchantment Mod**
*Move faster, jump higher, and step with ease!*

The Swift Enchantment Mod introduces a powerful new enchantment called Swift, designed to enhance mobility in Minecraft. By default, it has two levels, granting the following benefits when applied to your boots:

* **Increased movement speed** – Sprint and walk faster.
* **Enhanced jump height** – Jump higher with ease.
* **Improved step height** – Walk up blocks smoothly without jumping.
* **Negating some fall damage** – With Feather Faling IV you don't take damage on falls under 4 blocks with this enchant included.

This enchantment is perfect for adventurers, builders, and anyone looking for a more fluid movement experience.
